modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: PCR machine can't find upgrade file on USB.

full_description_text:  
- I am trying to update the Bio-Rad PCR machine.  
- The machine does not see the upgrade file on the USB.  
- I need help with this issue.
short_description: PCR machine can't find upgrade file on USB.
description:
- I am trying to update the Bio-Rad PCR machine.
